input:
Subject: Urgent Security Notification: Unauthorized Login Attempt Detected

Dear Valued Customer,

Our automated security systems have detected an unusual login attempt on your account from an unrecognized IP address in a foreign location. For your protection, we have temporarily suspended access to your online banking portal.

To restore full access and secure your funds, you are required to verify your identity and update your security credentials immediately by visiting our secure verification portal at: http://portal-bank-security-update.com/auth/login

Please complete this process within the next 4 hours to avoid permanent account deactivation and a mandatory manual review by our fraud department.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this security matter.

Sincerely,
Global Financial Security Team

Subject: Order Update - Shipment Status

Dear Customer,

We are contacting you regarding your recent order. There appears to be a discrepancy in the delivery address provided. Please review the attached document containing your order summary to ensure all details are correct so we can proceed with your shipment.

Best regards,

Logistics Support Team

Subject: URGENT: Security Breach Detected - Order #88291 Verification Required

Dear Valued Customer,

Our automated security systems have flagged an unauthorized attempt to access your account following a recent order processing session. To prevent further fraudulent activity and secure your funds, we have temporarily suspended your online banking access.

To restore your account and confirm your recent order details, you must complete our mandatory identity verification process immediately. Failure to verify your credentials within the next 4 hours will result in a permanent account freeze.

Please click the link below to sign in and secure your profile:
http://secure-bank-verification-portal.net/login/auth

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Global Security Department
Premier National Bank

Dear Valued Custumer, there is a problem with your bank acount security settings. To prevent deactivation, you must log in immedately to update your info: http://online-bank-secure-update.net/login. Failure to do this will result in permanent loss of access.
